tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Arrays, strings, hashing, two pointers. Connect every problem to reality: LRU cache = Redis eviction. Bloom filter = lsm/crawler dedup.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: HTTP/HTTPS/DNS/TLS/TCP deep. PostgreSQL fundamentals: ACID, isolation levels, indexes, EXPLAIN ANALYZE. RFC/ADR habit starts.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace: OTLP protocol study, proto definitions, raw gRPC echo server. All 5 repos created with CI/CD and go-test-race.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Sliding window, binary search, linked lists. Tag by pattern.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Node.js Deep: Event loop, streams, AsyncLocalStorage. JWT RS256, HMAC webhooks, rate limiting (switchboard concepts).

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace Collector: Receives OTLP, validates, publishes to Kafka. PayCore v1: Auth layer, webhook design, idempotency.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Trees, graphs, BFS/DFS, heaps. Speed + explanation clarity.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Kafka deep: consumer groups, lag monitoring, transactional producer. Distributed systems fundamentals: CAP theorem, Sagas.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace Pipeline: Kafka consumer, tail-based sampling, ClickHouse bulk writer. DungBeetle v1: Job queue in Go.

title: Month 4: OpenTrace UI + RouteMaster v1

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: DP fundamentals, greedy, intervals.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Elasticsearch inverted index, full-text search relevance. SSE proxying, WebSocket fan-out (relay internals).

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace UI v1: Trace list, waterfall rendering. RouteMaster v1: Logistics engine, fan-out notifications.

deliverables: OpenTrace UI showing live span waterfalls

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Bit manipulation, tries, union-find. Timed mocks.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: ClickHouse MergeTree internals, monthly partitioning, TTL. Event sourcing, double-entry ledger math.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace Storage: ClickHouse schema, indexing. PayCore v2: Ledger system, reconciliation engine.

title: Month 6: Query Service + BookWise v1

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Graph algorithms (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford), topological sort.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Distributed locks, fencing tokens, PostgreSQL advisory locks. gRPC streaming queries.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace Query: gRPC API, service graph. BookWise v1: Seat reservation with distributed locks.

deliverables: K8s Operator for span ingestion scaling

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Hard problems only. Review weak areas.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Consistent hashing, virtual nodes. Go AST for auto-instrumentation SDK. WebSocket live tail.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace UI v2 + SDK: Auto-instrumentation, Live Tail. DungBeetle v2: Exactly-once cron, leader election.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: 1–2 hard problems/day. Mock interview sets.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: RAG pipelines, vector databases (PGVector). pprof flame graphs, k6 load testing p99 optimization.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: OpenTrace: 10M spans/sec load test. BookWise: AI seat recommendation. All projects polish: BENCHMARKS.md, ADRs.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: 1 problem/day. Maintenance.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Revise only. No new material.

tracks.name: Deliverables
tracks.content: Apply via referral. 5–10 real conversations with engineers. LFX application final.
